title: Green Carbon Development Selects Axens VeganÂ® Technology for New Renewable Fuels Facility in Texas
content:
Green Carbon Development, led by Process Technical Services (PTS), has selected Axensâ€™ VeganÂ® hydroprocessing technology for its upcoming renewable fuels facility in Texas. Designed with a capacity of 10,500 barrels per stream day (BPSD), the plant will produce both Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) and Renewable Diesel (RD), providing flexibility to adapt to market demand while delivering significant carbon abatement across the transportation sector.

The facility will benefit from PTSâ€™s expertise in plant design, operations, and startup services, combined with its feedstock partnerâ€™s knowledge in agricultural sourcing and logistics. This integration is expected to create a strong regional hub for clean fuels production.

Axens will supply the technology license, catalysts, proprietary equipment, operator training, and technical services. With decades of innovation in renewable fuels, Axensâ€™ technology lineage extends from Esterfipâ„¢ biodiesel, which won the 2007 Kirkpatrick Award, to todayâ€™s globally recognized VeganÂ® solution. The partnership positions the project as a cornerstone of the regional clean energy economy while reinforcing Axensâ€™ role as a leader in SAF and HVO production via the HEFA process.
author: Analysts Account
